'''zadhongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hidato|hidato]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hidato|hidato]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zadhongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zædhengeth|zædhengeth]] || [[word:zædhengej|zædhengej]] || [[word:zædhengesh|zædhengesh]] || [[word:zædhenge|zædhenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadhodhongoth|zadhodhongoth]] || [[word:zadhodhongoj|zadhodhongoj]] || [[word:zadhodhongosh|zadhodhongosh]] || [[word:zadhodhongo|zadhodhongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadhongoth|zadhongoth]] || [[word:zadhongoj|zadhongoj]] || [[word:zadhongosh|zadhongosh]] || [[word:zadhongo|zadhongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadhofngoth|zadhofngoth]] || [[word:zadhofngoj|zadhofngoj]] || [[word:zadhofngosh|zadhofngosh]] || [[word:zadhofngof|zadhofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zadhongotho|zadhongotho]] || [[word:zadhongojo|zadhongojo]] || [[word:zadhongosho|zadhongosho]] || [[word:zadhongoko|zadhongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zadhongoth|zadhongoth]] || [[word:zadhongoj|zadhongoj]] || [[word:zadhongosh|zadhongosh]] || [[word:zadhongo|zadhongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zadhongothol|zadhongothol]] || [[word:zadhongojol|zadhongojol]] || [[word:zadhongoshol|zadhongoshol]] || [[word:zadhongokol|zadhongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zadhongothotho|zadhongothotho]] || [[word:zadhongojojo|zadhongojojo]] || [[word:zadhongoshosho|zadhongoshosho]] || [[word:zadhongoko|zadhongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zadhongothon|zadhongothon]] || [[word:zadhongojon|zadhongojon]] || [[word:zadhongoshon|zadhongoshon]] || [[word:zadhongokon|zadhongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zadhongothoro|zadhongothoro]] || [[word:zadhongojoro|zadhongojoro]] || [[word:zadhongoshoro|zadhongoshoro]] || [[word:zadhongokoro|zadhongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
